stemHtml: A Performance Class A turbojet aeroplane is planned to be operated on contaminated runways and on wet runways with suitable performance accountability for the increased stopping distance. For planning purposes, the use of…

options.a: reduced take-off thrust is allowed only on contaminated runways.
options.b: derated take-off thrust is allowed on both types of runways.
options.c: reduced take-off thrust is allowed on both types of runways.
options.d: derated take-off thrust is allowed only on wet runways.
